programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Diriyah 2018
programme.desc: Antonio Felix da Costa faces a relentless chase from the imperious reigning champion Jean-Eric Vergne in a Saudi Arabian showdown. Can the Portuguese racer hold on to claim a first win in four years?

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Mexico City 2019
programme.desc: Mexico City, scene of so many great Formula E races, witnesses yet another classic as Lucas di Grassi delivers “the most magical moment of Formula E” in front of a rapturous Foro Sol.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Bern 2019
programme.desc: Can Jean-Eric Vergne overcome Lucas di Grassi, treacherous weather conditions and a resurgent Mitch Evans to become the first man in Formula E to claim back-to-back titles?

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Santiago 2020
programme.desc: When Techeetah bring in Portuguese driver Antonio Felix da Costa to partner reigning champion Jean-Eric Vergne, things quickly descend into chaos as the two driver's relationship sours in Santiago.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Berlin 2020
programme.desc: Antonio Felix da Costa is making real waves in Formula E before Covid 19 interrupts the season he seemed destined to win. Can a plan to stage six back-to-back races in Berlin offer him a lifeline?

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Valencia 2021
programme.desc: Valencia E-Prix turns to chaos as torrential rain creates the worst conditions Formula E has ever experienced. As cars spin off the track in all directions, a shocking finish leaves the field baffled.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Monaco 2021
programme.desc: Formula E arrives in Monaco, the mecca of motor racing, and delivers Formula E’s greatest ever race. With multiple lead changes and daredevil overtaking, Monaco is treated to an unforgettable classic.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback: Berlin 2021
programme.desc: Chaos reigns in the title showdown to end all title showdowns, as Nyck de Vries, Mitch Evans and rookie Jake Dennis do battle to claim the first FIA Formula E World Championship in 2021.
